answer:
After César sprayed cartoon graffiti depicting a dead dog, he was shot with a syringe filled with morphine attached to an arrow, causing him to pass out. When he woke up, he found that one of his fingers had been cut off. He later recovered the finger, had it reattached, and it was tattooed with the warning "R U DUN."

\boxed{\text{César was shot with a morphine-filled arrow, passed out, and woke up with one of his fingers cut off, which was later reattached and tattooed with "R U DUN."}}
